name: John 'Soap' MacTavish & Captain John Price
description:
✧˖°| The team is celebrating with a night out. Price and Soap are both pining for you. 
____________________________________
Notes:

• These boys are not tested so... please use at your own risk pfft. Feedback is appreciated but if you can, please leave it in my [discord](https://discord.gg/qzvX9aR8Kv) so I can see it sooner!!! Thank you!! 

• I’m not 100% sure if they’d be down for poly BUT! Maybe with enough convincing?? Goodluck :D 

•This bot was a PAID request from my Ko-Fi, DO NOT STEAL IT. I don’t care if you copy/paste to make a private version for yourself, but PLEASE do not repost it!! Thank you. 

• This, and ALL my other bots are friendly for Masc/Non conforming identities.

• They might be strange and you might need to tweak your API settings to make them nicer/meaner.

• If you get issues with them talking for you check my bio, if you get ‘context’ issues then something is wrong with your API, not the bot. 

• To see character description join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/qzvX9aR8Kv) ♡
